device_name: EFAI ChestSuite XR Pleural Effusion Assessment System
intended_use: EFAI Chestsuite XR Pleural Effusion Assessment System is a software workflow tool designed to aid the clinical assessment of adult (18 years of age or older) Chest X-Ray cases with features suggestive
intended_use_full: EFAI Chestsuite XR Pleural Effusion Assessment System is a software workflow tool designed to aid the clinical assessment of adult (18 years of age or older) Chest X-Ray cases with features suggestive of pleural effusion in the medical care environment. EFAI Chestsuite XR Pleural Effusion Assessment System analyzes cases using an artificial intelligence algorithm to identify suspected findings on chest x-ray images taken in PA position. It makes case-level output available to a PACS/workstation for worklist prioritization or triage. EFAI Chestsuite XR Pleural Effusion Assessment System is not intended to direct attention to specific portions or anomalies of an image. Its results are not intended to be used on a stand-alone basis for clinical decision-making nor is it intended to rule out pleural effusion or otherwise preclude clinical assessment of X-Ray cases.
ground_truth: Majority agreement of three US board-certified radiologists for clinical test; three board-certified radiologists for internal validation test
other_metrics: Internal validation test AUC: 0.9517 (sensitivity 0.9013, specificity 0.8869 on 1454 images); Average processing time: 19.6 seconds (predicate device: 27.76 seconds)
